name: No Tenemos Rancho Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, corn starch, cocoa, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
2. Add nuts and raisins to the dry mixture.
3. Stir in the oil, vanilla, and hot applesauce until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 40 minutes or until done.
